feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Which tables link a packed HU (GR not posted) to an Inbound Delivery in SAP EWM?
Which FM or tables can be used to calculate open Warehouse Request quantity for IBD in SAP EWM?
non stock items in EWM
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a storage location which is managed by EWM.

Now I have a requirement that user wants to keep the non-stock Items in the warehouse (Don't know why).

I want to understand the process, Inbound delivery will be created but what will happen if we don't have a material number? somethings they create a material and sometimes its a text (text item with LA) for example.

What would be the inbound process in case we have a material number and if we don't have a material?

entry.title: Suitable module for warehouse management
entry.content:
Hello everyone.
I'm sorry, but I made a mistake copying the message from the translator yesterday.
I really wanted to ask this question:
Would this "Extended Warehouse Management in SAP S/4HANA" module be the right module for working in warehouse logistics? I work in a large warehouse and I manage materials in/out and stock control. I want to improve my SAP level in "warehouse management."
Is this the right module, or do you know of a more suitable one?
Thank you.

entry.title: Single Order Staging in Adcanced Production Integration vs Backflush
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

to get this straight: Clear Question

Is Single (or Cross) Order Staging in Adcanced Production Integration (with PMR) working togehter with backflush?

 

(Or do i need in every case adjust master data in a way that backflush for these materials is disabled and i need to consume the raw materials in an additional step?)

entry.title: Staging for production in REM in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm executing scope item BJH in SAP Public cloud. The issue I have is in the step of staging the components for production; no requirement/ quantities for staging are displayed in the Pull list: storage location Level.

Prerequisite are done: assignment of the REM profile 0002 to the finished product, assignment  of bin to PSA, controle cycle creation with Staging Indicator 5 EWM Staging for components.

PS: the storage location is warehouse managed 

Do you any ideas what could be missing and is EWM staging with REM even supportd  in SAP S/4 Public Cloud ?

entry.title: TU creation problem
entry.content:
Hi Gurus ,

While creating TU I am getting below error message  that :

" >>>>>>>>>> Start of action "Add TU Activity" at 25.03.2025 15:51:41 >>>>>>>>>> "  . 

Message No. " /SCWM/SHP_RCV198"

Please help. 

Thanks , 

Praveen

entry.title: Yard Logistics: Auto-Generate Opposite Yard Order does not work anymore
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have two problems:

First with the function "Auto-Generate Opposite Yard Order"

I Customized it here: 

My expectation is, that when the Inbound Yard Order is completed (manually or automatically), the system generates automatically an Outbound Yard Order. It worked well until a system update in EWM was made. Now it does not work anymore. I remember, that there is a technical queue in the backroung which must be activated. My guess is, that the queue is not active anymore. Any ideas where I find this queue to check on it? Or any other ideas why it does not work?

Second with "Auto Complete Yard Order"

Customizing:

My expectation here: The Yard Order will be completed automatically, when all Yard Tasks in the Yard Order are activated, started and confirmed. And the Outbound Yard Order will be activated, as soon as it is created. Is my expectation correct? If Yes: It does not work. If No: How is the system behaviour at this point?

 

Many thanks for your help!

Many Greetings,

Sandra

entry.title: EWM for MRO and Other materials
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a process in which warehouse operation is responsible for receiving both non-stock items like consumables and also raw materials. My requirement is to use one fiori app for both processes. 

For non-stock items GR will be done based on the PO and for the others we will be doing a GR with an inbound delivery i.e. for raw materials. 

Any standard app I can use to perform GR against a PO and an inbound delivery?

entry.title: Inbound delivery needed for EWM or not?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new here, do we need to have inbound delivery (must) in embedded EWM S4 Hana?

I which cases, it is preferred to have an inbound delivery and in which cases not? for example syncronous goods movement. 

please suggest.

entry.title: Dump Background job program /SCWM/RBINMATMNT, Tcode /SCWM/BINMAT
Urgent: Issues with SAP Certification Renewal and Learning Hub Subscription
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am reaching out to share my recent experience and seek guidance regarding the renewal of my SAP certification and the purchase of an individual Learning Hub subscription.

I have been an SAP consultant for 13 years, working both as a partner and now as a customer. Recently, I received a notification to extend the validity of my SAP certification. Upon realizing that I needed to purchase a Learning Hub subscription, I informed my manager, who encouraged me to keep my certification valid. Consequently, I purchased an individual Learning Hub subscription on Thursday (Order ID: 0002281064).

To my surprise, I did not receive any confirmation or access to the Learning Hub even after 24 hours. I raised multiple support tickets but struggled to get a proper response. On Sunday, I finally received a response from an SAP store admin, who mistakenly treated my request as a partner request. After clarifying that it was an individual request, they informed me that they couldn't fulfill the order and suggested purchasing certification attempts instead.

I am utterly surprised and annoyed by this response and the lack of maturity from SAP Learning support. Here are my concerns:

  1. What are the guidelines for maintaining SAP certification validity, especially when changing companies? Do certifications lapse with a change in organization?
  2. Where can I find relevant support and guidance for individual certification renewal and Learning Hub subscriptions?
  3. Why is there no proper channel or guidance to address these issues?

I believe it is crucial for people to be aware of these challenges. I am on the verge of losing my certification due to the lack of proper guidance from SAP. I hope this post brings attention to the issue and helps others who might be facing similar challenges.

Thank you for your support and guidance.

SAP Learning Solution  Certification  SAP Extended Warehouse Management @SAP

entry.title: Want help to change delivery goods issue status from Completed (C) to not started(A)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have delivery which is 0 in EWM system and the information from EWM to S/4 has be updated as delivery is completed.

Can you please help us with the program which help to change the goods issue status from C to A.

entry.title: Process Order Not creating PMR in EWM 950
entry.content:
Experts,

I have ran through all of the config steps to enable PP to EWM config for Advanced Production Integration for Process Orders however when I create a new Process Order via COR1 tcode, I am not seeing any SMQ1 queue in ECC or SMQ2 queue in EWM or anything within /SCWM/PMR.   My EWM system is decentralized.  I have not found any logs in SLG1 within ECC system.  Is there any way to somehow troubleshoot this?  I have double checked my distribution model and PSA setups.  It's just weird I don't see any distribution logs.

Any help would be appreciated.

David

entry.title: Bin capcity error for fixed bins product
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In a Public cloud, We are having 2-fixed bins assignment concept for a product.

Requiremnt is- For a product-ABC, has two fixed bins XXX (Bin capacity - 25 EA ), YYY (Bin capacity - 15 EA). For the first bin 20 EA stock is filled, When we are trying to create new warehouse task for 15EA for the same product we are getting error as " no Putaway- max storage type qty exceeded".

Kindly, suggest what are configs iam missing in the storage type which i configured.

Pls find the below screenshots for your reference.

 

Kindly do the needful.

Thanks,
Saikumar

entry.title: Auto Warehouse task creation after Goods receipt is done in putaway
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In Public cloud,

Kindly provide the process, How the warehouse task should create automatically after the Goods receipt is done as per the putaway Rules ( Fixed bins- Bin Capcity) .

Thanks,
Saikumar

entry.title: Zero Delivery OBD still showing in Open for Billing
entry.content:
Hello Team ,

Nee your help on the issue. We have made a delivery zero in EWM and same is replicated to S/4 also with Zero Qty.

The GM status is marked as completed. However , Billing status is still open. Can you please suggest on why we are having this issue.

 

Regards

 

Sanjay Arora

entry.title: Do not allow to do the Putaway for the HU , if the GR is not done
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

I have a business requirement , where we don't want the Put-away to be allowed for the HU for which GR is not done.

This has to be done for a particular one warehouse and that too for production HU. Procurement from supplier process should remain unaffected.

I have tried using the HU User status and it works fine . But customer is looking for any other alternative solution.

Appreciate , if you can help

Thanks 

Sanjay

entry.title: Clear Open PMR from "Stage for Production" app
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have few component quantity which are no longer required to be consumed against an order but in "Stage for Production" app these components are still showing as these needs to be staged because the PMR is exisitng. Can we get rid of these PMR"s which are no longer required to stage

example: For an order "O1", we need 100 EA of component "A". But we have completed the order by just staging and consuming 98 EA"s of "A". Now the order O1 is finally confirmed but in stage for produciton app, we still see 2 EA needs to be staged which is creating a confusion to the operators. 

Can we clear the record for 2 EA from "Stage for Production" app ?

I know that it will be cleared if we change the quantity of component "A" in "O1" to 98 but this is not so feasible as we need to change for each order and we do TECO at the end of the month. We use cross- order staging. 

 

Thanks

Vamsi Krishna

entry.title: What configurations/enhancements in SAP EWM we can implement to prioritize warehouse task creation?
entry.content:
Hello SAP EWM Community,

We’re looking to optimize the creation and prioritization of warehouse tasks for high-demand items in our distribution center managed by SAP EWM. Specifically, we aim to reduce the picking time and improve order fulfillment rates for these items.

Key Points:

  1. Our warehouse handles a mix of high- and low-demand items.
  2. Current picking strategies do not adequately prioritize high-demand items, leading to delays.
  3. We utilize standard picking and putaway strategies configured in SAP EWM.

Specific Question:

What configurations or enhancements in SAP EWM can be implemented to prioritize warehouse task creation for high-demand items, ensuring faster picking and improved order fulfillment?

Looking forward to your insights and recommendations!

Best regards
